steps.title: Substitute x = 8 into the given equation
steps.content:
We're given $y = 5x + 10$ and asked to find $y$ when $x = 8$. Replace $x$ with $8$ in the equation:
$$y = 5(8) + 10$$

steps.title: Simplify and find y
steps.content:
Evaluate the expression step by step:
$$y = 40 + 10$$
$$y = 50$$
